# Hi there, I'm Batuhan Özdemir!

  

👋

  

### Computer Engineering Student | Full-Stack Developer |

  

Algorithm Enthusiast

  

I am a highly motivated second-year Computer Engineering student (High Honors, GPA: 3.73) at Bursa Uludağ University. I combine analytical skills with hands-on software development experience, specializing in full-stack development and simulation modeling. Currently, I also serve as the Head of the Events Department at ULUDOTT (Digital Game Design Community).
